---
title: "Create UTCI Dataset"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Environment Setup

```{r setup}
# Packages
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyterra)
library(sf)

# Path Structure
root <- rprojroot::has_file("extreme-heat-vs-sv.Rproj")$make_fix_file()
raw_data_dir <- root("data/raw")
utci_data_dir <- root("data/raw/utci")
geo_data_dir <- root("data/raw/geographies")
proc_data_dir <- root("data/processed")
dir.create(proc_data_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
src_dir <- root("src")

# Parameters
country_map <- c(
  "MOZ" = "Mozambique",
  "ZWE" = "Zimbabwe",
  "LSO" = "Lesotho",
  "NAM" = "Namibia",
  "ZMB" = "Zambia"
)
```

# Functions

```{r}
source(file.path(src_dir, "data_processing.R"))
```

# Data Import

## Geographies

### Mozambique

```{r}
sf_moz <- (
  st_read(
    file.path(geo_data_dir, "Mozambique 2022 DHS - sdr_subnational_boundaries", "shps", "sdr_subnational_boundaries.shp")
  )
  %>% rename_with(tolower)
  %>% select(
    country = cntrynamee,
    adm_name = dhsregen,
    adm_code = regcode
  )
  %>% arrange(adm_code)
)
```

### Zimbabwe

```{r}
sf_zwe <- (
  st_read(
    file.path(geo_data_dir, "Zimbabwe 2015 DHS - sdr_subnational_boundaries", "shps", "sdr_subnational_boundaries.shp")
  )
  %>% rename_with(tolower)
  %>% select(
    country = cntrynamee,
    adm_name = dhsregen,
    adm_code = regcode
  )
  %>% arrange(adm_code)
)
```

### Lesotho

```{r}
sf_lso <- (
  st_read(
    file.path(geo_data_dir, "Lesotho 2023 DHS - sdr_subnational_boundaries", "shps", "sdr_subnational_boundaries.shp")
  )
  %>% rename_with(tolower)
  %>% select(
    country = cntrynamee,
    adm_name = dhsregen,
    adm_code = regcode
  )
  %>% arrange(adm_code)
)
```

### Namibia

```{r}
sf_nam <- (
  st_read(
    file.path(geo_data_dir, "Namibia 2013 DHS - sdr_subnational_boundaries", "shps", "sdr_subnational_boundaries.shp")
  )
  %>% rename_with(tolower)
  %>% select(
    country = cntrynamee,
    adm_name = dhsregen,
    adm_code = regcode
  )
  %>% arrange(adm_code)
)
```

### Zambia

```{r}
sf_zmb <- (
  st_read(
    file.path(geo_data_dir, "Zambia 2018 DHS - sdr_subnational_boundaries", "shps", "sdr_subnational_boundaries.shp")
  )
  %>% rename_with(tolower)
  %>% select(
    country = cntrynamee,
    adm_name = dhsregen,
    adm_code = regcode
  )
  %>% arrange(adm_code)
)
```

### Create combined shapes

```{r}
sf_all <- (
  bind_rows(
    sf_moz,
    sf_zwe,
    sf_lso,
    sf_nam,
    sf_zmb
  )
)
```

# Generate UTCI dataset

```{r}
df_utci <- build_utci_daily(utci_data_dir, country_map, sf_all)
```

# Save

```{r}
df_utci %>% write_csv(file.path(proc_data_dir, "utci_max_daily.csv"))
```

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
